Contact Information

Professional Title PhD Candidate

Location Sydney, Australia
GitHub mtics
LinkedIn lizhiwi

Professional Summary
PhD candidate at UTS AAII researching privacy-preserving personalized recommender systems under federated, multimodal, and foundation-model settings.

Education
2023 - present Sydney, Australia PhD Candidate University of Technology Sydney Analytics (Australian Artificial Intelligence Institute)
Advisor — Prof. Guodong Long.
Research focus — privacy-preserving personalized recommender systems under federated, multimodal, and foundation-model settings.
2020 - 2023 Shanghai, China M.S. ShanghaiTech University Computer Science and Technology
Advisor — Prof. Lu Sun.
Research focus — multi-view / multi-label learning.
2016 - 2020 Zhengzhou, China B.E. Zhengzhou University Computer Science and Technology
Member of the ZZU-DROID bipedal-robot team (2017–2020).
RoboCup Asia-Pacific / China Open competitions, 2017–2019.

Experience
2023 - 2023 Shanghai, China Research Assistant ShanghaiTech University
Continued research with Prof. Lu Sun on multi-view multi-label learning.
2022 - 2022 Shanghai, China Teaching Assistant — Machine Learning ShanghaiTech University
Instructor — Prof. Sibei Yang (Fall 2022).
2022 - 2022 Shanghai, China Teaching Assistant — Machine Learning ShanghaiTech University
Instructor — Prof. Hao Wang (Spring 2022).

Awards
2025 Best Reviewer AISTATS 2025
Recognized as one of the Best Reviewers at the 28th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics.
2024 AAII Student Best Paper Award 2024 Australian Artificial Intelligence Institute, UTS
Top student award in the AI Application category at AAII, UTS.
2022 Merit Student ShanghaiTech University
Awarded for outstanding academic performance during M.S. studies.
2018 Outstanding Student Cadre Zhengzhou University (School of Information Engineering)
2019 2nd Place RoboCup Asia-Pacific Tianjin Invitational Tournament 2019
With the ZZU-DROID bipedal-robot team.
2019 3rd Place RoboCup China Open 2019, Standard Platform League (NAO)
With the ZZU-DROID bipedal-robot team.
2017 2nd Prize Softbank Robot Cup — 2017 China Robot Skills Competition
With the ZZU-DROID bipedal-robot team.

Service
Conference Reviewer / PC Member: ICLR, NeurIPS, AAAI, IJCAI, WWW, ECAI, AISTATS
Journal Reviewer: IEEE TPAMI, IEEE TNNLS, IEEE TKDE, IEEE TAFFC, IEEE TAI
Tutorial Speaker: Personalized Federated Recommender Systems @ WWW 2025
Invited Speaker / Workshop Host: FL@FM-AJCAI 2024 — Federated Learning for Foundation Models
